_purpose: Baseline scorecard for evals/workbench. Tracks structural counts that must not regress; CI gate eval-workbench-verify compares current state against this file and fails on any decrease. See bead soc-ymph.10 (D10).
_refresh_command: make -C evals/workbench head-to-head > evals/workbench/scorecard-latest.json && git diff -- evals/workbench/scorecard-latest.json
